overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a tribal village at night. The environment features organic bone-like architecture, bioluminescent green lighting, and woven bamboo walkways. The character walks through the village, passing NPCs and eventually entering a water pool.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal village entrance under bone canopy

events.description: exits covered bone canopy into open village square

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward beneath a large curved structure, then emerging into an open village area

notable_agents.action: villager walking ahead on the path, moving away from camera

entered.detail: large organic ribbed structure forming a roof overhead
tribal building facade made of interwoven bamboo strips
green glowing light source attached to the structure

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive curved bone canopy in a tribal village at night. The camera follows the character as they walk forward, passing bioluminescent green lights. Around the 5-second mark, the character exits the covered area into an open village square with woven bamboo decking.

scene_state.functional_zone: open village square with intricate woven ground patterns

agents.ego_description: crossing the open village square, navigating around circular patterns woven into the floor

entered.detail: intricate circular patterns woven into the bamboo flooring
distant bone-like arch structures marking the village perimeter

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a wide-open village square illuminated by moonlight and green bioluminescent lamps. The ground features elaborate circular woven patterns. The camera maintains a steady third-person follow as the character progresses toward the far side of the square.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower village level with communal cooking area

events.description: approaching a cooking fire with rising smoke becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking down a slight incline toward a lower communal area where villagers are gathered

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on the woven ground near a basket

entered.detail: smoldering fire with blue smoke rising from a stone pit
sloped walkway leading down to the lower village level

segments.scene_description: The character descends to a lower level of the village where several NPCs are sitting on the ground. A cooking fire burns in the center, emitting smoke. The environment feels more intimate and communal, with villagers resting near woven baskets.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated bamboo walkways connecting village structures

events.description: begins ascending a bamboo ramp to an elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing up a bamboo ramp and walking along elevated walkways overlooking the village

notable_agents.action: villager walking ahead on the elevated bamboo path

entered.detail: raised walkway constructed of bamboo poles with woven railings
decorative bamboo safety barriers along the walkway edges

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a ramp to an elevated bamboo walkway that winds through the village. From this height, distant village lights and organic structures are visible against the night sky. The character follows another villager along the winding path.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway leading to sacred water pool

events.description: enters a darker covered structure with dense organic roofing
steps off the wooden deck and enters the water pool

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered structure and approaching a circular pool, then wading into the water

entered.detail: enclosed walkway with dense woven bone roofing blocking the sky
large pool of dark water with lily pads floating on the surface

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a darker covered structure with dense organic roofing. The character emerges to a circular water pool surrounded by bamboo decking. The character approaches the edge and steps into the water, which ripples around their legs as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bioluminescent tribal village at night, transitioning from sheltered bone structures to open communal spaces and finally into a quiet water pool. It begins under a massive curved bone canopy illuminated by green lights, moving forward until the character emerges into a wide-open village square featuring elaborate circular woven bamboo patterns under the moonlight. The camera then descends to a more intimate lower level where smoke rises from a central cooking fire surrounded by resting villagers, before ascending a ramp onto an elevated walkway that winds through the organic architecture. As the path leads through a darker covered structure with dense roofing, the scene finally opens onto a circular water pool where the character steps into the rippling water.
